title: Buttery Fish Medley
description: A simple and flavorful fish medley dish cooked with buttery goodness. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets (4-6 oz)
ingredients.notes: white fish, cod or tilapia work well

ingredients.name: Buttery
ingredients.notes: real butter or unsalted butter work well

ingredients.name: White
ingredients.notes: mixed vegetables, such as carrots, zucchini, bell peppers

instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the fish fillets to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve the fish and vegetables hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
